channel.title: Kuqa on VBOX
channel.description: Recent content in Kuqa on VBOX

item.title: Effects of Salt Thickness on the Structural Deformation of Foreland Fold-and-Thrust Belt in the Kuqa Depression
item.description: Download Li C, Yin H, Wu Z, Zhou P, Wang W, Ren R, Guan S, Li X, Luo H and Jia D (2021) Effects of Salt Thickness on the Structural Deformation of Foreland Fold-and-Thrust Belt in the Kuqa Depression, Tarim Basin: Insights From Discrete Element Models. Front. Earth Sci. 9:655173. Title Effects of Salt Thickness on the Structural Deformation of Foreland Fold-and-Thrust Belt in the Kuqa Depression, Tarim Basin: Insights From Discrete Element Models
